---
title: "Joan D'Aguilar"
image: "JoanDaguilar.JPG"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/joandaguilar/"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/JoanDaguilar"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:joandaguilar@spelman.edu"
output:
  postcards::jolla
---

I am an undergraduate researcher interested in Biomedical Engineering using genomics to understand Health equity.
